info.title: trtext
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trtext
## Summary
Print a parse tree with a specific interval
## Description
Reads a tree from stdin and prints the source text. If 'line-number' is
specified, the line number range for the tree is printed.
## Usage
trtext line-number?
## Examples
trquery grep //lexerRuleSpec | trtext
## Current version
0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.

-f, --file                   Read parse tree data from file instead of stdin.
-v, --verbose
-l, --files-with-matches     print only names of FILEs with selected lines
-n, --line-number            print line number with output lines
-L, --files-without-match    print only names of FILEs with no selected lines
-c, --count                  print only a count of selected lines per FILE
--version
--help                       Display this help screen.
--version                    Display version information.
